_publications._publicationTitle: Optical dopamine monitoring with dLight1 reveals mesolimbic phenotypes in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Nf1+/- mice displayed enhanced dLight1.2 responses to CS presentation on the first day of testing (Figure 4J, inset) compared to Nf1+/+ littermates
details: Nf1+/- mice exhibited larger dLight1.2 responses to CS presentation on first day of testing compared to Nf1+/+ littermates (unpaired t-test; t20=2.34, p=0.03)
